# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  - name: functionAppName
    type: string
  - name: identity
    type: secureString
  - name: storageAccountName
    type: string
  - name: keyVaultName
    type: string
  - name: sqlServerName
    type: string
  - name: cosmosDBAccountName
    type: string
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    name: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      managedServiceIdentity:
        type: SystemAssigned
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY: "[reference(concat('microsoft.insights/components/', parameters('functionAppName'))).InstrumentationKey]"
          WEBSITE_CONTENTAZUREFILECONNECTIONSTRING: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
          WEBSITE_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY: "[reference(concat('microsoft.insights/components/', parameters('functionAppName'))).InstrumentationKey]"
      - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/providers/roleAssignments
        name: "[guid(concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '/Microsoft.Storage/', parameters('storageAccountName')))]"
        apiVersion: 2018-07-02
        properties:
          roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Contributor')]"
          principalId: "[parameters('identity')]"
          scope: "/subscriptions/[subscription().subscriptionId]/resourceGroups/[resourceGroup().name]/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
      - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/roleAssignments
        name: "[guid(concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '/Microsoft.KeyVault/', parameters('keyVaultName')))]"
        apiVersion: 2018-09-01-preview
        properties:
          roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Contributor')]"
          principalId: "[parameters('identity')]"
          scope: "/subscriptions/[subscription().subscriptionId]/resourceGroups/[resourceGroup().name]/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
      - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/providers/roleAssignments
        name: "[guid(concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '/Microsoft.Sql/', parameters('sqlServerName')))]"
        apiVersion: 2018-09-01-preview
        properties:
          roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Contributor')]"
          principalId: "[parameters('identity')]"
          scope: "/subscriptions/[subscription().subscriptionId]/resourceGroups/[resourceGroup().name]/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
      - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/providers/roleAssignments
        name: "[guid(concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '/Microsoft.DocumentDB/', parameters('cosmosDBAccountName')))]"
        apiVersion: 2018-09-01-preview
        properties:
          roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'Contributor')]"
          principalId: "[parameters('identity')]"
          scope: "/subscriptions/[subscription().subscriptionId]/resourceGroups/[resourceGroup().name]/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/[parameters('cosmosDBAccountName')]"
